ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the host */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the host was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the host was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "host_roles" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who owns the channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the channel was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channels_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_genres" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_data" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel that the stream belongs to */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre that the stream belongs to */,
  "stream_date" TEXT /* Date of the stream */,
  "stream_time" TEXT /* Time of the stream */,
  "viewers" INTEGER /* Number of viewers during the stream */,
  "guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests during the stream */,
  "ads_shown" INTEGER /* Number of ads shown during the stream */,
  "ads_revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated from ads during the stream */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_data_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_data_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscribers" (
  "subscriber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscriber */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel that the subscriber is subscribed to */,
  "subscriber_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscriber */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the subscriber */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscriber subscribed to the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscriber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscribers_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisers" (
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertiser */,
  "advertiser_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertiser */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advertiser */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated by the advertiser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ads" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream that the ad was shown on */,
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertiser who placed the ad */,
  "ad_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad */,
  "ad_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the ad */,
  "ad_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the ad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streaming_data ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_advertiser_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertiser_id") REFERENCES advertisers ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertiser who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_advertiser_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertiser_id") REFERENCES advertisers ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
column_names: Timestamp when the host was created
Timestamp when the host was last updated
ID of the host who owns the channel
Timestamp when the channel was created
Timestamp when the channel was last updated
ID of the channel that the stream belongs to
ID of the genre that the stream belongs to

Number of guests during the stream
Number of ads shown during the stream
Revenue generated from ads during the stream
ID of the channel that the subscriber is subscribed to
Date when the subscriber subscribed to the channel
ID of the stream that the ad was shown on
ID of the advertiser who placed the ad
ID of the advertiser who made the payment
Date when the payment was made
Date when the report was generated
